why_add: Flux2 is now an explicit target family for this system.
It should be evaluated as a next-generation image generation and image editing backbone.
It may reduce the need for SDXL/Pony specialty passes for some composition/reference tasks, but it does not replace the Civitai SDXL/Pony library without proof.
comfyui_runtime_proof_required: ComfyUI starts locally or on EC2 with Flux2 nodes visible in object_info.
Text encoder, diffusion model, and VAE resolve from configured model directories.
A Flux2 text-to-image prompt creates a real output file.
A Flux2 image edit/reference workflow creates a real output file.
Output manifest includes prompt, seed, model hashes, dimensions, runtime logs, and SHA256.
Visual QA compares Flux2 output against current Flux1/SDXL baselines.
Only after QA can Flux2 move from planned candidate to production candidate.
routing_rules: Use Flux2 dev for quality/reference/editing passes after proof.
Use Flux2 klein for preview/proxy and interactive tests after proof.
Use Flux2 API variants only behind optional API/cost gates.
Never load Flux1/SDXL/Pony/SD15 LoRAs into Flux2 unless a registry entry explicitly proves Flux2 compatibility.
Use image bridges from Flux2 to SDXL/Pony detail passes.
